articles.author: Skye Jacobs
articles.title: This MIT robot flies through the air then dives underwater using the same wings - TechSpot
articles.description: Diving seabirds like puffins use their wings to both fly and swim, even though air and water behave very differently. "Thinking of a wing that could operate...
articles.content: First look: MIT researchers have built a small robot that can move through both air and water using the same wings and switch between the two without any extra hardware. The work comes out of mechani… [+3549 chars]
